name: ЗУМЕРЫ
short_description: Zoomers” is a visual novel that plunges you into the world of young dreamers who risk everything for their goal. Four guys - Kostya, Genka, Stas and “Bazuka” - decide to realize their dream: to open their own business. However, their plans collapse when a series of strange and dangerous events begin
detailed_description:
“Zoomers” is a visual novel that plunges you into the world of young dreamers who risk everything for their goal. Four guys - Kostya, Genka, Stas and “Bazuka” - decide to realize their dream: to open their own business. However, their plans collapse when a series of strange and dangerous events begin.

Kostya buys a garage from an unfamiliar man for the office of the future business. But soon everything goes wrong: the real owner of the garage appears, who accuses the guys of stealing his expensive car and illegally entering his property. He gives them a few days to return the money, find the car or find the crook who sold them the garage.

Miraculously, the friends find out the whereabouts of the garage seller and follow him to an abandoned village where no one has lived for years. Mysterious events, hidden secrets and dangers await them there, which will change their lives forever.
